name: Ria Money Transfer
description_short: 725 E Broadway, Louisville, KY — Ria Money Transfer for check cashing and international money transfers.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer operates at 725 E Broadway in Louisville, Kentucky, serving the community with check cashing and international money transfer services. This standalone location is conveniently positioned on East Broadway, one of Louisville's main commercial corridors.

At this Louisville location, you can access check cashing for personal and payroll checks, money transfer services to over 190 countries, and bill payment options. While a direct phone number isn't published, the staff at the 725 E Broadway branch is available during business hours to assist with your financial needs.

If you're a Louisville resident needing quick cash or sending money internationally, Ria's East Broadway location offers a reliable alternative to traditional banking. Bring a valid government-issued ID for any transaction, and you'll find competitive rates and fast service at this KY location.
pros: Extensive agent network including 24-hour 7-Eleven locations for convenient cash deposits and pickups
Multiple send methods: online, mobile app, in-person, and WhatsApp for flexibility
Diverse recipient options including bank deposit, cash pickup, digital wallet, home delivery, and ATM withdrawal
Global coverage to 35+ countries across all major regions
Bi-lingual platform support in English and Spanish
Mobile app available for on-the-go money transfers
Bill payment services available at many agent locations
cons: Website does not disclose specific fees, exchange rates, or transfer speed timelines
Service availability and operating hours depend on third-party agent locations, which may be inconsistent
No information provided about regulatory licensing, compliance certifications, or consumer protections
Bill payment and other services only available at select agent locations, not all branches
Recipient country coverage not fully detailed on homepage—must search by country
best_for: Immigrants and expatriates sending money to family in Latin America, Africa, or Asia
Consumers in urban areas with access to convenience stores, grocery shops, or pharmacies offering Ria services
People preferring cash-based transfers and in-person service over purely digital platforms
Bilingual Spanish speakers seeking accessible money transfer options
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best for immigrants, expatriates, and underserved consumers who need affordable international money transfers with in-person service options and diverse payout methods. The main caveat is that specific fees, exchange rates, and transfer speeds are not disclosed on the website, so consumers must contact agents or log into an account to get actual pricing before committing to a transfer.
services: In-person cash transfers at agent locations
meta_description: Ria Money Transfer at 725 E Broadway, Louisville, KY. Check cashing and fast international money transfers.
